reviews.text:
Awesome experience.
Had connected with Rajat for shooting a video of my super bike delivery.
Must say the investment was worth it. Had requested him for shots being taken be according to my inputs, this guy is really very experienced he worked upon with more better ideas making the final video footage with utmost professionalism and awesome editing.
I recommend him as a very prompt and professional guy.
